_comment: Embedded board-ID -> sensor-key manifest (§5.2, §12.9). Sensor keys differ across M1/M2/M3/M4 generations, so this is updated with each release and shipped embedded (never fetched remotely). An unknown board ID degrades to 'N/A' rather than crashing; fanless Macs report no fans as 'N/A'. Placeholder to be populated in Phase 1.
